flashcards.front: What is a Traditional Computing Environment?
flashcards.back: A single-user, standalone system managing local hardware resources (e.g., personal computers).
Separation of roles: servers provide services/resources, clients request them over a network.
A network of autonomous computers appearing as a single cohesive system to users.
Smart home devices, wearables, and IoT sensors integrating seamlessly into daily life.

flashcards.front: Core purpose of gradients in the SVG
flashcards.back: To visually distinguish and enhance the representation of each computing environment type.
